description.ko: AQUA-5는 지구에서 가장 깊은 해구 속에 숨겨진 비밀을 밝혀내기 위해 심해의 압도적인 수압을 견딜 수 있도록 설계된 최첨단 탐사 장치입니다.
description.en: AQUA-5 is a state-of-the-art exploration unit designed to withstand the crushing pressures of the deep ocean, uncovering the secrets hidden within the Earth's darkest trenches.

prompt: Cinematic shot of AQUA-5, a futuristic bioluminescent deep-sea research submersible, navigating through the Hadal zone. Surrounded by glowing crystalline formations and rare abyssal fauna, dark navy and neon cyan lighting, 8k resolution, photorealistic, hyper-detailed mechanical parts, volumetric underwater lighting.
